name: Syracuse Chamber Orchestra
tagline: Bringing live orchestral music to our community
mission: Inspiring the human spirit through music, unlocking the potential of one's creativity by giving career musicians, teachers, and working professionals the chance to perform and provide enjoyment for our community.
history: The Syracuse Chamber Orchestra is a newly-formed ensemble of local musicians who are professionals, para-professionals, and music teachers who want to perform and make music together. Supported in part by a grant from the CNY Community Arts program, the orchestra gave its inaugural concert on October 24, 2021 at the Onondaga Community College Recital Hall.

advertising.headline: Request for Advertising
advertising.summary: We invite you to be a part of the Syracuse Chamber Orchestra. When your business advertises with the SCO you will get a full color ad in each of our programs as well as acknowledgement of your support on our website.
advertising.body: Our patrons will know you value and support music in our community and the value of live orchestral performances to the CNY area. There will be at least two concerts this year and we had standing room only crowds last year. Our performances will be held at the OCC Recital Hall and the West Genesee High School auditorium.
advertising.instructions: To place an ad, email syracusechamberorchestra@gmail.com or mail your order to the address below. Please include a camera-ready ad with your order. For a 1/3 page ad a business card is sufficient.
advertising.donationNote: If you wish to make a donation to the SCO in lieu of an ad please do so on our website. Checks payable to Syracuse Chamber Orchestra.
